headline: Housing Inventory Annual Growth Slows for 9th Straight Month in February, Realtor.com Says
summary: US housing inventory rose in February, though the annual growth rate decelerated for the ninth month

raw.headline: Housing Inventory Annual Growth Slows for 9th Straight Month in February, Realtor.com Says
raw.summary: US housing inventory rose in February, though the annual growth rate decelerated for the ninth month

headline: Inventory Recovery is Plateauing: Realtor.com® February Monthly Housing Report
summary: The housing market continued to rebalance in February, with inventory growing for a 28th consecutive month of year-over-year gains; however, the pace of improvement continued to cool, highlighting a recovery that is losing steam and remains uneven across regions and price points, according to the February Monthly Housing Report from Realtor.com®. This report also found in February, new listings grew 2.4% year over year, with declines in the storm-hit Northeast and stronger gains elsewhere.

This report also found in February, new listings grew 2.4% year over year, with declines in the storm-hit Northeast and stronger gains elsewhere.

headline: Meta Wants To Build Its Own AI Chips - Here's Why
summary: Meta CFO Susan Li reveals the company is developing in-house chips for AI training to optimize custom ranking and recommendation tasks.
